body.u: As I look back over my last 50 years, the vague memories/still with me. My first job was in an office as a junior. I had to do alota lot of travelling but I quite enjoyed it. When I first decided to get a flat nearer by job, the ex-pression on my parent's faces, they didn’t think that I could manage on my own, but they soon got use to the idea. Then I got another job in the firm abita bit higher up as a personal secretary, I had to attend evening classes for more qualifications but it all seemed worth it. I stayed in this employment for 3, and then the firm closed down. It was harder getting a job after that, there was not so many vacancies open for secretary, and for a month I was unemployed, I eventually got a job in a solicitor’s. I enjoyed the work, and it wasn’t far from where I lived, so I didn’t have alota lot of travelling. I stayed in this employment for 4 years, then I left to get married, I missed the work, but soon after I had alot to occupy my mind, I had a baby boy Christopher, and 3 years later I had a baby girl.
